name: Ayesha Khan
title: Better than photos
review: Ghats wall piece for living room — paint is neat, hook was on. Took 2 days extra but worth it.

name: Priya Sharma
title: Bag gets noticed
review: Newspaper + tyre tube bag for office. Rainy day no issue so far. Colleagues keep asking where from.

name: Neha Verma
title: Solid for the price
review: Was scared to buy decor online — edges ok, sits flat. 4.5 bc delivery box had a dent, product fine.

name: Riya Patel
title: Diwali gifts
review: Pouch + small organizer. Relatives liked. No plastic wrap which I appreciated.

name: Kavita Reddy
title: Organizer ok after few days
review: Felt stiff first 2 days then normal. CS replied on WhatsApp about cleaning — helpful.

name: Simran Kaur
title: Parents said nice
review: Sent wall piece for anniversary. Ma liked the painting. Small card inside was cute.

name: Meera Joshi
title: Second buy
review: First was a pouch this time wall thing. Same quality as before. Watched reel for how to hang.

name: Ananya Desai
title: Not flashy, looks real
review: Compared to random Amazon decor — this feels handmade. Dust with dry cloth only.

name: Shruti Iyer
title: Fair price
review: Unique stuff. Delivery guy called before coming. Box had name spelled right lol.

name: Pooja Hegde
title: Sale order still came fast
review: Ordered on weekend, got Thu. Paper inside only — no bubble wrap.

name: Tanya Bhatia
title: Both of us use
review: I took the bag he uses the pouch. Stitching holding up ~1 month daily use.

name: Sakshi Nair
title: Less plastic in house
review: We try to avoid plastic. This doesn't look like 'recycled junk' tbh.

name: Divya Agarwal
title: Guests asked
review: Put in guest room. Cousin asked link. Bit pricey but ok.

name: Aditi Rao
title: Told friends
review: Looks like site pics. Not shiny fake finish — more matte.

name: Geeta Singh
title: Saw on TV
review: Ordered after Shark Tank clip. Heavier than expected — good heavy not bad.

name: Roshni M.
review: Wall decor — looks good on beige wall.

name: Smriti K.
review: Bag is diff from usual — in a good way.

name: Jhanvi T.
review: Nice. Wish slightly bigger but ok.

name: Alia S.
review: Packed safe, reached on time.

name: Deepa R.
review: Paint not chipped — 3 weeks in.

name: Nikita P.
review: Handles feel strong.

name: Vandana F.
review: Happy with buy. Will order again.

name: Sanjana W.
review: Desk thing neat. Fits pens + phone.

name: Ishita B.
review: Sis ordered same week lol.

name: Mansi C.
review: Zip smooth. Colour ok.

name: Pallavi G.
review: Gifted — they sent thank you msg.

name: Kirti D.
review: As shown. No surprises.

name: Richa V.
review: Print pattern subtle — like it.

name: Farah A.
review: Would buy another colour if available.

name: Natasha K.
review: Tracking worked. No CS drama.
